match.userMessage:
Locked overhead flat-lay wide shot captures the action at Bondi shoreline as SCARLETT steps forward into the shallows. A gentle wave breaks at her ankles while the coral lipstick rolls steadily from her open palm and settles in the wet sand beside the stamped brand mark. Natural late-afternoon light casts soft directional shadows across the frame.

[SCARLETT, soft reflective]: "Wear it everywhere."

Ambient sounds: gentle waves lapping shoreline. wave breaking softly at ankles, lipstick rolling onto wet sand.
